summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Persona 5 Royal fan website. All core functionality working correctly including navigation, page content, interactive elements, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Home page loads with hero banner and 'PERSONA 5 ROYAL' title
Home page feature section displays with red box overlay
Navigation works for all links (HOME, ABOUT, CHARACTERS, PRODUCTS)
About page loads with story content and features section
Products page loads with merchandise grid (8 products found)
Products page category filters work (tested Apparel and All categories)
Characters page loads with functional tabs
Characters tab shows 9 character cards with codenames (JOKER, SKULL, etc.)
Personas tab shows 8 persona cards with details
Footer appears on all pages with complete sections
Footer contains Spotify button, 2 Discord links, 4 purchase links, 3 social media links
Back to top button functionality works
Mobile responsive design - menu toggle works
Mobile navigation menu opens and links function correctly
